We are 4 people, departing from Shenzhen to Shanghai for a 3-day trip, meeting any one of the following requirements:
1. Hope to try the following restaurants: Village Entrance Tree and Ethai Thai Restaurant · Bird's Eye Chili · Thai Bake (Xintiandi Branch) and Shanghai Bulgari Hotel · Baolixuan Chinese Restaurant
2. Hope to leave Shanghai Ocean Aquarium no earlier than 14:00
